record.field: Construction Developer: Update Product Category Cost Nature
code

# Simple, 1 level check to facilitate creating new subcategories. We don't support more complex operations for record in records: record['x_cost_nature'] = record.x_cost_nature or record.parent_id.x_cost_nature
Construction Developer: Initialize Sales Order Line Sequence on Sales Order create
code

sequences = record.order_line.mapped('sequence') if len(sequences) != len(set(sequences)): # not all different: create order new_sols = [] for sol_i, sol in enumerate(record.order_line): previous_same_sequences = sum(seq == sequences[sol_i] for seq in sequences[:sol_i + 1]) # Handle duplicates by adding fractional offsets which will be used to order the list new_sols.append((sol.id, sol.sequence + (previous_same_sequences / sequences.count(sol.sequence)))) seqs = {sid: i for (i, (sid, _)) in enumerate(sorted(new_sols, key=lambda soltup: soltup[1]))} # Associate each sid with its sequence (order) when sorted else: # all different: use existing order seqs = {sol.id: i for (i, sol) in enumerate(sorted(record.order_line, key=lambda sol: sol.sequence))} # Associate each sid with its sequence (order) when sorted for sol in record.order_line: sol['sequence'] = seqs[sol.id] + 1
code
Construction Developer: Update Progress Increment on Quantity Increment change
record['x_progress_increment'] = record.x_quantity_increment / record.product_uom_qty if record.product_uom_qty > 0 else False
code
Construction Developer: Update Quantity Increment on Progress Increment change
record['x_quantity_increment'] = record.x_progress_increment * record.product_uom_qty
code
Construction Developer: Update Quantity Increment on section button click
code
Construction Developer: Update Quantity Delivered
code
Construction Developer: Create Procurement Moves
code
Construction Developer: Generate Remark Reference on Create
Construction Developer: Write Remark Stages on Create or Write
code
Construction: Work Item - Set Work Item name
code
record.write({'x_name': record.x_product_id.name})
Construction: Work Item - Set unit cost and unit price from product
code
record.write({'x_unit_price': record.x_product_id.lst_price, 'x_unit_cost': record.x_product_id.standard_price})
Construction: Work Item - Update related wi lines on product cost/price change
code
Construction: Work Item - Update product cost
object_write
x_product_id.standard_price
equation
record.x_unit_cost
Construction: Work Item - Update product price
object_write
x_product_id.lst_price
equation
record.x_unit_price
Construction: Work Item - Update margin on price change if margin is fixed
code
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_margin'] = (wi.x_unit_price - wi.x_unit_cost) / wi.x_unit_cost if wi.x_unit_cost > 0 else False
Construction: Work Item - Update price on margin/cost change if margin is fixed
code
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = wi.x_unit_cost * (1 + wi.x_unit_margin)
Construction: Work Item - Recompute price
code
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = sum(line.x_unit_price * line.x_quantity for line in wi.x_work_item_line_ids)
Construction: Work Item - Set as template
code
Construction: Work Item - Create new product for work item
code

for wi in records: new_product = env['product.product'].create({ 'name': wi.x_name, 'default_code': wi.x_reference, 'type': 'service', 'service_policy': "delivered_manual", 'list_price': wi.x_unit_price, 'standard_price': wi.x_unit_cost, 'uom_id': wi.x_unit_custom_id.id, }) wi.write({'x_product_id': new_product.id})
Construction: Work Item - Create/modify work item on sale order line
code
Construction: SOL - Create associated Work Item
code
Construction: SOL - Open SOL Work Item
code
action = { "type": "ir.actions.act_window", "res_model": "x_work_item", "res_id": record.x_line_work_item_id.id, "view_mode": "form", "target": "new", }
Construction: Product - Archive Old Work Item Template
code
env['x_work_item'].search([("x_active", "!=", False), ("id", "not in", records.ids), ("x_product_id", "in", records.x_product_id.ids), ("x_is_template", "!=", False)]).write({'x_active': False})
code
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List (from Purchase Order)
base_automation
code
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List (from Vendor Bill)
base_automation
code
Construction: Update Product Cost and Vendor List
code
Construction Developer: Compute Cost Nature Analysis

# NB: apparently SQL queries are not counted as maintenance lines
# Since a simple server action executed only once in e.g. ir_model_post.xml to # drop the db after model creation (and not check its type every time this server action runs) # does not work on the runbot for some reason, do the following instead # Ask Postgres what the type of 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report' currently is env.cr.execute(''' SELECT relkind FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report' ''') result = env.cr.fetchone() # fetch the result of the query that was just executed
# Drop the physical TABLE Odoo auto-created (no _auto = False in XML model) when creating the model # We need this code to create this model as a VIEW and not a TABLE (auto-created) # 'r': ordinary TABLE, i.e. not a VIEW ('v') if result and result[0] == 'r': env.cr.execute('DROP TABLE x_cost_nature_analysis_report CASCADE')
# action called from a project: fetch the records from the project # action called from a sale order: passed in the context as active_ids so_ids = (env.context.get('active_ids') if not (project_id := env.context.get('project_id')) else env['sale.order'].search([('project_id', '=', project_id)]).ids) or [0]
action = { 'name': "Cost Nature Analysis", 'view_mode': 'list', 'res_model': 'x_cost_nature_analysis_report', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'context': {'view_id': 'view_x_margin_report_analysis_list', 'search_default_group_by_cost_nature': True, 'search_default_group_by_category': True, 'search_default_group_by_product': True }}
# skip the query if there are no sale orders if so_ids != [0]: # Format the Python list into a valid SQL tuple string # e.g., [1, 2] becomes "(1, 2)" and [1] becomes "(1)" so_ids_sql = tuple(so_ids) if len(so_ids) > 1 else f"({so_ids[0]})"
# Actual logic env.cr.execute(f''' CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW x_cost_nature_analysis_report AS ( WITH raw_data AS ( SELECT sol.order_id AS x_so_id, wil.x_work_item_id AS x_work_item_id,
COALESCE(wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_quantity, -- COALESCE looks at WIL first; if it's NULL (no work item), it uses SOL. COALESCE(wil.x_product_id, sol.product_id) AS x_product_id, COALESCE(wil.x_cost_nature, sol.x_cost_nature) AS x_cost_nature, COALESCE(wil.x_category_id, sol.x_category_id) AS x_category_id, COALESCE(wil.x_unit_price * wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.price_unit * sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_total_price, COALESCE(wil.x_unit_cost * wil.x_quantity * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.purchase_price * sol.product_uom_qty) AS x_total_cost,
COALESCE(wil.x_quantity * (wil.x_unit_price - wil.x_unit_cost) * sol.product_uom_qty, sol.product_uom_qty * (sol.price_unit - sol.purchase_price)) AS x_margin,
CASE WHEN wil.x_work_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN (wil.x_unit_price - wil.x_unit_cost) / NULLIF(wil.x_unit_price, 0) ELSE (sol.price_unit - sol.purchase_price) / NULLIF(sol.price_unit, 0) END AS x_margin_percent FROM sale_order_line sol LEFT JOIN x_work_item_line wil ON sol.x_line_work_item_id = wil.x_work_item_id WHERE sol.display_type IS NULL AND sol.product_id IS NOT NULL AND sol.order_id IN {so_ids_sql} ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS id, *, -- take everything from the previous table
-- Individual Margin / Total Margin of all rows x_margin / NULLIF(SUM(x_margin) OVER (), 0) AS x_margin_share,
-- Individual Cost / Total Cost of all rows x_total_cost / NULLIF(SUM(x_total_cost) OVER (), 0) AS x_cost_share
FROM raw_data)''')
# add active_ids to the context of the action action['context']['active_ids'] = so_ids
code
Construction Developer: Check Stock Move Validity
code
Construction Developer: Create Delivery Location

for so in records.filtered(lambda so: (so.state != 'draft' or env.context.get('force_loc', False)) and not so.partner_shipping_id.x_ws_location_id): wh = env['ir.model.data']._xmlid_to_res_id('construction_developer.stock_location_1') action = env['stock.location'].create({'name': f"{so.partner_shipping_id.name}", 'usage': 'internal', 'company_id': env.company.id, 'location_id': wh}) so.partner_shipping_id['x_ws_location_id'] = action
